name: @acme-skunkworks/skill-initialise-package-repo
description: Agent skill: one-shot, idempotent post-generation setup for a repo freshly created from npm-package-template — reset changelog/, re-seed the release-please manifest, rewrite package identity + repo-config, pull shared skills via npx skills add --copy (A-776), clear the template-seed skill-config gitignore (A-812), wrap initialise-skills, and apply the non-copied GitHub settings (npm-release env, GO/NO GO ruleset, Trunk changelog bypass, enable Release).
